Pyxis Mobile and Levy have gone through some changes since the company was founded in 1998.
Eventually, Pyxis Mobile decided to change its focus and sell companies its platform instead of building customized applications.
The great news for Pyxis Mobile is that Levy has helped it become a leader in the industry.
